series_metadata.series_description: Materials related to the submission of the OCSE 157 Annual Performance Report created to track services under the Child Support program. This report is completed and filed annually as a preliminary report with revisions possible prior to the end of the calendar year.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, then destroy provided state and federal audits are completed and released, and all discrepancies are resolved., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
